about.title: About
about.name: Yahari
about.description: I'm a middle school student who loves programming and technology. I'm mainly focused on web development and working on various projects. I enjoy learning new technologies and strive to grow every day.
about.now: Right now I'm building a school SNS/LMS while deepening my knowledge of infrastructure and Kubernetes. If something looks interesting, I just try it out.

skills.title: Favorite Tools & framework
skills.pageIntro: The languages, frameworks, and tools I work with day to day — each with a one-line note on what it's for.

tools.title: Tools
tools.pageIntro: A small collection of browser-only tools. Nothing you type or generate is ever sent to a server — everything runs right where you are.

passwordGenerator.title: Password Generator
passwordGenerator.description: Generate a random password by choosing length and character types. Runs entirely in your browser.

jsonFormatter.title: JSON Formatter / Diff
jsonFormatter.description: Format and validate JSON. Compare two JSON objects and see a diff.

base64Url.title: Base64 / URL Encoder
base64Url.description: Encode and decode text or files using Base64 or URL encoding.

colorPalette.title: Color Palette Generator
colorPalette.description: Pick one color and generate complementary, analogous, and triadic palettes.

typographyPreview.title: Typography Preview
typographyPreview.description: Adjust font, size, weight, and spacing to preview text rendering in real time.

markdownHtml.title: Markdown ↔ HTML Converter
markdownHtml.description: Write Markdown and see it rendered or converted to HTML in real time.

textCounter.title: Text Counter
textCounter.description: Count characters, words, lines, bytes, and reading time all at once.

memeGenerator.title: Meme Generator
memeGenerator.description: Upload an image, add top and bottom text, and download your meme.

yamlJson.title: YAML ↔ JSON Converter
yamlJson.description: Convert between YAML and JSON. Useful for config file transformations.

imageColor.title: Image Color Analyzer
imageColor.description: Upload an image to extract its dominant colors with hex codes and percentages.

excuseGenerator.title: Excuse Generator
excuseGenerator.description: Generates random excuses for various situations. Use at your own risk.

cookieClicker.title: Cookie Clicker
cookieClicker.description: Click cookies, buy upgrades, and automate production in this idle game.

typingSpeed.title: Typing Speed Test
typingSpeed.description: Measure your typing speed (WPM / CPM) and accuracy in English or Japanese.

yardle.title: Yardle
yardle.description: A Wordle clone — guess the 5-letter word in 6 tries. Yahari edition.

mouseMusic.title: Mouse Music
mouseMusic.description: Move your cursor to make music — X is pitch, Y is octave. Powered by Web Audio API.

noneAI.title: NoneAI Image Generator
noneAI.description: Algorithmic image generation with zero AI — just math and code.

httpStatus.title: HTTP Status Code Dictionary
httpStatus.description: All status codes explained in one sentence. Real-time search by code, name, or description.

commitMessage.title: Commit Message Generator
commitMessage.description: Generate Conventional Commits messages in seconds. Supports gitmoji.

passwordGenerator.title: Password Generator
passwordGenerator.intro: Pick a length and the character types you want, and a password is generated using the Web Crypto API's secure randomness. Generation and copying happen entirely in your browser — nothing is ever sent to a server.

jsonFormatter.title: JSON Formatter / Diff
jsonFormatter.intro: Format and validate JSON with configurable indentation. In Diff mode, compare two JSON objects and highlight what changed.

base64Url.title: Base64 / URL Encoder
base64Url.intro: Encode or decode text using Base64 or URL (percent) encoding. File-to-Base64 conversion is also supported.

colorPalette.title: Color Palette Generator
colorPalette.intro: Choose a base color and instantly generate five harmonious palettes: analogous, complementary, triadic, split-complementary, and monochromatic.

typographyPreview.title: Typography Preview
typographyPreview.intro: Adjust font family, size, weight, letter-spacing, and line-height to preview how your text will render.

markdownHtml.title: Markdown ↔ HTML Converter
markdownHtml.intro: Write Markdown on the left and see it rendered as HTML on the right. Toggle to view the raw HTML source and copy it.

textCounter.title: Text Counter
textCounter.intro: Paste or type text to instantly get character count, word count, line count, byte size, and estimated reading time.

memeGenerator.title: Meme Generator
memeGenerator.intro: Upload any image, add top and bottom text with custom color and size, then download your meme as a PNG.

yamlJson.title: YAML ↔ JSON Converter
yamlJson.intro: Convert between YAML and JSON. Handles common config file structures — objects, arrays, strings, numbers, booleans, and null.

imageColor.title: Image Color Analyzer
imageColor.intro: Upload an image to extract the dominant colors using pixel sampling and clustering. Copy any color code instantly.

excuseGenerator.title: Excuse Generator
excuseGenerator.intro: Select a category and generate a random excuse for being late, forgetting homework, missing work, or anything else. Use responsibly.

cookieClicker.title: Cookie Clicker
cookieClicker.intro: Click the cookie to earn cookies, then buy upgrades to automate production. Progress is saved in your browser.

typingSpeed.title: Typing Speed Test
typingSpeed.intro: Type the passage as fast and accurately as you can in 60 seconds. Supports English (WPM) and Japanese (CPM) modes.

yardle.title: Yardle
yardle.intro: Guess the secret 5-letter word in 6 tries. Green means right place, yellow means wrong place, gray means not in the word.

mouseMusic.title: Mouse Music
mouseMusic.intro: Move your cursor over the canvas to play notes — X position controls pitch, Y position controls octave. Different scales available.

noneAI.title: NoneAI Image Generator
noneAI.intro: Generate beautiful patterns using pure algorithms — Mandelbrot set, Perlin-style noise, cellular automata, and more. Zero AI.

httpStatus.title: HTTP Status Code Dictionary
httpStatus.intro: Every HTTP status code from 1xx to 5xx, explained casually. Click a code to copy it.

commitMessage.title: Commit Message Generator
commitMessage.intro: Select a type, fill in the scope and description, and get a Conventional Commits message instantly. Toggle gitmoji on or off.

projects.title: Projects
projects.pageIntro: Projects I've built while learning along the way. From personal experiments to school tools, I follow my curiosity and build things.

bluearchive.title: BlueArchive Unofficial API
bluearchive.description: RESTful API providing Blue Archive game data. Access character info, stats, skill data and more.

school.title: School SNS/LMS
school.description: Social network and learning management system for schools. Supports communication between students and teachers.

alt.title: Discord Bot "ALT"
alt.description: A Discord bot packed with a wide range of server-management essentials, plus a custom-built economy system.

contact.description:

Feel free to reach out.
contact.ctaNote: Or contact me directly via the links above

email.description: Feel free to email me for project consultations or work inquiries.

github.description: Check out my open source projects and code works.

x.description: I share daily activities and tech-related information.

cookie.settingsAccepted: You accepted the use of cookies

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Yahari (hereinafter referred to as "this site") establishes the following privacy policy regarding the handling of user's personal information.

section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
section1.description: This site may collect the following information:
items: Name, email address, and inquiry content provided through the contact form
Access analysis data by Google Analytics (anonymized IP address, browser information, pages viewed, etc.)

section2.title: 2. Use of Cookies
section2.description: This site uses cookies to improve user experience and for access analysis.
section2.gaDescription: This site uses Google Analytics, an access analysis tool by Google. Google Analytics uses cookies to collect data. This data is collected anonymously and does not identify individuals.
section2.gaDisable: You can refuse collection by disabling cookies in your browser settings. For more information, please see

section3.title: 3. Purpose of Information Use
section3.description: Collected information is used for the following purposes:

section4.title: 4. Disclosure to Third Parties
section4.description: This site will not provide personal information to third parties without user consent, except as required by law.

section5.title: 5. Security
section5.description: This site takes necessary and appropriate measures for the safe management of personal information, including prevention of leakage, loss, and damage.

section6.title: 6. Cloudflare Turnstile
section6.description: The contact form on this site uses Cloudflare Turnstile for spam prevention. This verifies that users are human. For more information, please see

section7.title: 7. Changes to Privacy Policy
section7.description: This site may change this privacy policy as necessary. The revised privacy policy shall take effect from the time it is posted on this site.

section8.title: 8. Contact
section8.description: For inquiries regarding this privacy policy, please contact us through the

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have been moved. Please check the URL.

serverError.title: Something went wrong
serverError.description: Sorry, a temporary problem has occurred. Please try again in a few moments.

badRequest.title: Bad Request
badRequest.description: The server could not understand the request due to invalid syntax. Please check the URL and request content.

teapot.title: I'm a teapot
teapot.description: The server refuses to brew coffee because it is, permanently, a teapot.
teapot.rfc: RFC 2324 - Hyper Text Coffee Pot Control Protocol

designSystem.label: DESIGN SYSTEM
designSystem.title: Design System
designSystem.description: An overview of the design tokens and UI primitives that make up this site — colors, typography, spacing, and components, all in one place.

colors.title: Colors
colors.description: A grayscale-based palette that adapts between light and dark mode.

typography.title: Typography
typography.description: Fluid typography powered by clamp(), scaling smoothly with the viewport width.

spacing.title: Spacing
spacing.description: Section spacing tokens measured in vh, keeping a consistent rhythm relative to viewport height.

buttons.title: Buttons
buttons.description: Two systems: pill-shaped for primary actions, compact for secondary controls.

cards.title: Cards
cards.description: Opaque cards that lift on hover.

forms.title: Form Fields
forms.description: Minimal underline-only inputs that change color on focus.

badges.title: Badges & Status
badges.description: Small badges and indicators for status display.

sampleCard.title: Sample card
sampleCard.description: Lifts up and gains a shadow on hover.

sampleField.label: Sample field
sampleField.error: This is a sample error message
